positive: A minimalist and highly stylized representation of a majestic golden retriever puppy, rendered in bold, geometric lines and negative space. The puppy is depicted in a playful, central pose, jumping over stylized floral elements. The overall aesthetic is inspired by Art Deco and clean modern linework, giving it a powerful, graphic silhouette. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo blue, mustard yellow, and creamy off-white. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for seamless apparel printing, ensuring strong contrast and scalability. Full body shot, vector illustration style, hyper-detailed linework, isolated on a clean background.
